news-global-econ.title: Oakland school district vowed reparations for Black students, yet outcomes appear stagnant after 5 years
news-global-econ.description: Oakland's reparations task force for Black students failed to meet objectives after five years. A member says the group "wasted our collective breath for a whole year."

news-global-econ.title: Aid Workers Warn Epicenter of DR Congo Ebola Outbreak Has Run Out of Clean Water
news-global-econ.description:
A field coordinator for humanitarian group Oxfam warned on Tuesday that supplies of clean water — the “first line of defense” against the Ebola epidemic in the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) — are “simply not available.”
